scripts.ready: pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter storybook build && pnpm --filter kitchen-sink build && pnpm --filter @flanksource/clicky-ui test && pnpm --filter storybook test && pnpm --filter e2e test
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md packages/ui/package.json packages/ui/README.md apps/kitchen-sink/package.json apps/storybook/package.json e2e/package.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md packages/ui/package.json packages/ui/README.md apps/kitchen-sink/package.json apps/storybook/package.json e2e/package.json
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @flanksource/clicky-ui build:icons && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
